evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my Label Capture integration from Scandit iOS SDK v7 to v8. Update the regex-method names in before-8.0-regex.swift.
evals.expected_output: The skill renames setPattern→valueRegex, setPatterns→valueRegexes, setDataTypePattern→anchorRegex, setDataTypePatterns→anchorRegexes throughout the file; leaves everything else (imports, isOptional, symbology values, LabelCaptureSettings DSL) untouched.

assertions.text: setPattern( is renamed to valueRegex(
setPatterns( is renamed to valueRegexes(
setDataTypePattern( is renamed to anchorRegex(
setDataTypePatterns( is renamed to anchorRegexes(
The old method names (setPattern, setPatterns, setDataTypePattern, setDataTypePatterns) are absent from the final file

Imports and non-regex logic are preserved: ScanditLabelCapture import, Symbology .ean13UPCA, the v7-style LabelCaptureSettings(labelDefinitions: [...]) array initializer (the result-builder DSL was only introduced in v8.1 and must NOT be silently introduced as part of a v7→v8.0 regex-rename migration), .optional(true), and the field names are still present

evals.prompt: I upgraded my iOS app to Scandit SDK 8.2 and I'd like to use the new per-field placeholder text API in my Validation Flow. Here's my current integration: before-8.2-validation-flow.swift. How do I add a placeholder for the expiry date field?
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, identifies the v8.2 LabelCaptureValidationFlowSettings.setPlaceholderText(_:forLabelDefinition:) addition, instantiates LabelCaptureValidationFlowSettings, sets a placeholder for the expiry date field, and applies the settings to the overlay.

assertions.text: LabelCaptureValidationFlowSettings() is instantiated in the updated code
setPlaceholderText(_:forLabelDefinition:) is called with the expiry date field name and a placeholder string (e.g. "MM/DD/YYYY")
validationFlowOverlay.apply( is called with the settings object

The existing Validation Flow setup is preserved: LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(labelCapture:view:), the delegate assignment, and the labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didCaptureLabelWith:) implementation are still present
The fix is applied to or shown in context of the user's before-8.2-validation-flow.swift code, not just described abstractly

evals.prompt: I just upgraded from Scandit iOS SDK 8.0 to 8.1 and I want to react to manual-input events from the Validation Flow (log them to our analytics back-end). Here's my current integration: before-8.2-validation-flow.swift. Add the new optional listener method.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the optional labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didSubmitManualInputFor:replacingValue:withValue:) delegate method (added in v8.1.0) to the existing LabelCaptureValidationFlowDelegate conformance. The required didCaptureLabelWith: method is preserved.

assertions.text: The optional method labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didSubmitManualInputFor:replacingValue:withValue:) is added to the LabelCaptureValidationFlowDelegate conformance
The method signature includes the parameters: field: LabelField, replacingValue oldValue: String?, withValue newValue: String
The existing required method labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didCaptureLabelWith:) is preserved
The didUpdateResult method is NOT added (only the v8.1 method was requested; didUpdateResult is v8.2+)
The existing Validation Flow setup is preserved: LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(labelCapture:view:) and the delegate assignment are still present

evals.prompt: I just upgraded from Scandit iOS SDK 8.1 to 8.2 and I want to react to partial result updates so I can show live progress and capture the frame image. Here's my current integration: before-8.2-validation-flow.swift. Add the new optional listener method.
evals.expected_output: The skill adds the optional labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didUpdateResult:asyncId:fields:frameData:) delegate method (added in v8.2.0) to the existing LabelCaptureValidationFlowDelegate conformance. The method receives a LabelResultUpdateType, an Int asyncId, an [LabelField], and an optional FrameData. The required didCaptureLabelWith: method is preserved.

assertions.text: The optional method labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didUpdateResult:asyncId:fields:frameData:) is added to the LabelCaptureValidationFlowDelegate conformance
The method signature includes: type: LabelResultUpdateType, asyncId: Int, fields: [LabelField], frameData: FrameData? (FrameData is OPTIONAL — `FrameData?`)
The existing required method labelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(_:didCaptureLabelWith:) is preserved
The existing Validation Flow setup is preserved: LabelCaptureValidationFlowOverlay(labelCapture:view:) and the delegate assignment are still present
